metadata.name: stg_topic_names
metadata.comment: Provides the summarised name (`topic_summary`) based on the top 15 words from the trained topic model. In addition, shows the top 15 words (`top_n_words`).

topic_group_id.name: topic_group_id
topic_group_id.comment:
Corresponds to the topic group number (ID) which is the result of a topic modelling.
For the list of topics, use the following query:

```sql
select
    topic as topic_group_id,
    topic_summary as topic_group_name,
    top_n_words
from `singapore-parliament-speeches.topic_modelling.topic_names_19_nmf_20240331`
order by topic_group_id
```

metadata.name: mart_attendance
metadata.comment: Provides detailed information about the attendance records of Members of Parliament (MPs) during various parliamentary sessions.

date.name: date
date.comment: The 'Date' field represents the specific date on which parliamentary sitting had happened or when the speech was delivered.

parliament.name: parliament
parliament.comment:
'Parliament' denotes the parliamentary term number. Each parliament meeting typically has two sessions.

|                              Parliamentary Term                               | Commencement | Prorogued  |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| [12th Parliament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/12th_Parliament_of_Singapore) | 2011-10-10   | 2015-08-25 |
| [13th Parliament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/13th_Parliament_of_Singapore) | 2016-01-15   | 2020-06-23 |
| [14th Parliament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/14th_Parliament_of_Singapore) | 2020-08-24   | Present    |

member_name.name: member_name
member_name.comment: 'Member Name' refers to the full name of the Member of Parliament (MP) whose attendance is being recorded.

member_party.name: member_party
member_party.comment:
'Party' indicates the political party or designation of the member.

| Acronym |                 Party                 |
| ------- | ------------------------------------- |
| PAP     | People's Action Party                 |
| WP      | Workers' Party                        |
| PSP     | Progress Singapore Party              |
| SPP     | Singapore People's Party              |
| NCMP    | Non-Constituency Member of Parliament |

member_gender.name: member_gender
member_gender.comment: 'Gender' represents the gender of the member (M for Male, F for Female).

member_ethnicity.name: member_ethnicity
member_ethnicity.comment: 'Ethnicity' represents the ethnicity of the member (Chinese, Malay, Indian, or Others).

is_present.name: is_present
is_present.comment: 'Is Present' is a boolean field indicating whether the MP was present on a particular date. A value of 'true' signifies presence, while 'false' indicates absence.

num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

metadata.name: mart_speeches
metadata.comment: Contains information about speeches delivered in the Singapore Parliament, including details such as speech ID, date, topic ID, speech order, member name, and the text of the speech.

date.name: date
date.comment: The 'Date' field represents the specific date on which parliamentary sitting had happened or when the speech was delivered.

speech_id.name: speech_id
speech_id.comment:
The 'Speech ID' is a unique identifier for each speech, providing a reference for easy identification.
It contains the date, the topic number, and the speech number (in running sequence).

topic_id.name: topic_id
topic_id.comment: 'Topic ID' represents the unique identifier for the topic or subject matter associated with the speech.

parliament.name: parliament
parliament.comment:
'Parliament' denotes the parliamentary term number. Each parliament meeting typically has two sessions.

|                              Parliamentary Term                               | Commencement | Prorogued  |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| [12th Parliament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/12th_Parliament_of_Singapore) | 2011-10-10   | 2015-08-25 |
| [13th Parliament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/13th_Parliament_of_Singapore) | 2016-01-15   | 2020-06-23 |
| [14th Parliament](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/14th_Parliament_of_Singapore) | 2020-08-24   | Present    |

volume.name: volume
volume.comment:
'Volume' represents the volume number associated with the parliamentary sitting. There are a possibly a few volumes per parliamentary session.

| volume | parliament | session |
|--------|------------|---------|
| 89     | 12         | 1       |
| 90     | 12         | 1       |
| 91     | 12         | 1       |
| 92     | 12         | 2       |
| 93     | 12         | 2       |
| 94     | 13         | 1       |
| 94     | 13         | 2       |
| 95     | 14         | 1       |
| 95     | 14         | 2       |

sittings.name: sittings
sittings.comment: 'Sittings' refers to the order of sittings conducted during a particular parliamentary session. This is expected to be in a running sequence.

member_name.name: member_name
member_name.comment: 'Member Name' refers to the full name of the Member of Parliament (MP) whose attendance is being recorded.

member_party.name: member_party
member_party.comment:
'Party' indicates the political party or designation of the member.

| Acronym |                 Party                 |
| ------- | ------------------------------------- |
| PAP     | People's Action Party                 |
| WP      | Workers' Party                        |
| PSP     | Progress Singapore Party              |
| SPP     | Singapore People's Party              |
| NCMP    | Non-Constituency Member of Parliament |

member_gender.name: member_gender
member_gender.comment: 'Gender' represents the gender of the member (M for Male, F for Female).

member_ethnicity.name: member_ethnicity
member_ethnicity.comment: 'Ethnicity' represents the ethnicity of the member (Chinese, Malay, Indian, or Others).

topic_title.name: topic_title
topic_title.comment: 'Topic Title' represents the title or name of the parliamentary topic.

topic_type.name: topic_type
topic_type.comment:
'Section Type' (or Topic Type) indicates the type of section associated with the topic. This is the acronym.

'Section Type Name' indicates the full name of the section.

| Acronym | Section Type Name                                                               |
|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| BI      | Bill Introduced                                                                 |
| BP      | Second or Third Reading Bills                                                   |
| OA      | Oral Answers to Questions                                                       |
| OS      | Oral Statement                                                                  |
| WA      | Written Answers to Questions                                                    |
| WS      | Correction by Written Statements                                                |
| WANA    | Written Answer to Question for Oral Answer not Answered by End of Question Time |

topic_type_name.name: topic_type_name
topic_type_name.comment:
'Section Type' (or Topic Type) indicates the type of section associated with the topic. This is the acronym.

'Section Type Name' indicates the full name of the section.

| Acronym | Section Type Name                                                               |
|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| BI      | Bill Introduced                                                                 |
| BP      | Second or Third Reading Bills                                                   |
| OA      | Oral Answers to Questions                                                       |
| OS      | Oral Statement                                                                  |
| WA      | Written Answers to Questions                                                    |
| WS      | Correction by Written Statements                                                |
| WANA    | Written Answer to Question for Oral Answer not Answered by End of Question Time |

is_topic_constitutional.name: is_topic_constitutional
is_topic_constitutional.comment:
'Is Topic Constitutional' is a boolean field indicating whether the topic concerns a constitution amendment.

This applies only if:

* The topic is was bill introduced ("BI") or bill in second or third reading ("BP").
* The topic contains the word "Constitution".

Typical examples of topic names which qualify are:

* Constitution of the Republic of Singapore (Amendment) Bill
* Constitution of the Republic of Singapore (Amendment No 2) Bill
* Constitution of the Republic of Singapore (Amendment No 3) Bill

is_topic_procedural.name: is_topic_procedural
is_topic_procedural.comment:
'Is Topic Procedural' is a boolean field indicating whether the topic concerns a procedural statement, and therefore should be considered excluded from the speech count..

This applies only if:

* The topic is bill introduced ("BI")
* The topic is correction by written statements ("WS")

speech_text.name: speech_text
speech_text.comment: 'Speech Text' contains the actual content of the speech delivered in the Parliament.

count_speeches_words.name: count_speeches_words
count_speeches_words.comment: Count of number of words within a given speech.

count_speeches_characters.name: count_speeches_characters
count_speeches_characters.comment: Count of number of characters (alphabetic characters only) within a given speech. i.e. Cumulative lenght of all words within the speech.

count_speeches_sentences.name: count_speeches_sentences
count_speeches_sentences.comment: Count of number of sentences within a given speech. Detected by, for example, periods, question marks, etc.

count_speeches_syllables.name: count_speeches_syllables
count_speeches_syllables.comment:
Count of number of syllables within a given speech.
Calculated using a heuristic method. See the [`count_syllables(word)`](https://github.com/jeremychia/singapore-parliament-speeches/blob/aab0ec3cf820a768c40e3a5ad22aa075640616d1/scripts/transform/speeches.py#L71C5-L71C20) function.

is_short_speech.name: is_short_speech
is_short_speech.comment: Indicates if the speech is considered short. TRUE if the word count is at or below the 10th percentile, otherwise FALSE.

is_long_speech.name: is_long_speech
is_long_speech.comment: Indicates if the speech is considered long. TRUE if the word count is at or above the 90th percentile, otherwise FALSE.

is_vernacular_speech.name: is_vernacular_speech
is_vernacular_speech.comment: Indicates if the speech contains the phrase "vernacular speech". TRUE if it does, otherwise FALSE.

vernacular_speech_language.name: vernacular_speech_language
vernacular_speech_language.comment: Specifies the language of the vernacular speech. Extracts "mandarin", "malay", or "tamil" if the speech is vernacular, otherwise NULL.

metadata.comment:
Long table of member's constitutency, appointments, and select committee participation.
Identify the difference by 'type'.

member_name.name: member_name
member_name.comment: 'Member Name' refers to the full name of the Member of Parliament (MP) whose attendance is being recorded.

type.name: type
type.comment: Refers to the constitutency, political appointment (position), or select committee participation (select committee).

member_position.name: member_position
member_position.comment: Refers to the constitutency, political appointment, or select committee participation.

effective_from_date.name: effective_from_date
effective_from_date.comment: In relation to a position, the date from which the appointment is effective from.

effective_to_date.name: effective_to_date
effective_to_date.comment: In relation to a position, the date from which the appointment is effective to.

is_latest_position.name: is_latest_position
is_latest_position.comment:
In relation to a position, whether it is a latest position.
For current MPs, this reflects their current appointment (effective to date is null).
For former MPs, this reflects the latest held appointment before stepping down.

metadata.name: fact_bill_activity
metadata.comment:
Provides reading (e.g. 'First Reading', 'Second Reading' etc.) activity by bill in an event (long) table format.

For how the reading (first, second, third) is distinguished, see the column documentation for 'reading'.

date.name: date
date.comment: The 'Date' field represents the specific date on which parliamentary sitting had happened or when the speech was delivered.

topic_id.name: topic_id
topic_id.comment: 'Topic ID' represents the unique identifier for the topic or subject matter associated with the speech.

reading.name: reading
reading.comment:
'Reading' indicates the bill's stage.

| Reading  | Description                                                                                                    | Indicated By                           |
| -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| -------------------------------------- |
| 1 First  | Draft bill introduced, title read, MPs research.                                                             | Topic = 'BI'                          |
| 2 Second | General debate, vote, if passed, title read again (Second Reading).                                           | Topic = 'BP' and speeches ref 2nd reading |
| 3 Third  | Review, vote, and passage (Third Reading).                                                                   | Topic = 'BP' and speeches ref 3rd reading  |

title.name: title
title.comment: 'Topic Title' represents the title or name of the parliamentary topic.

metadata.name: dim_topics
metadata.comment: Provides information about parliamentary topics, including details such as topic ID, date, topic order, title, and section type.

topic_id.name: topic_id
topic_id.comment: 'Topic ID' represents the unique identifier for the topic or subject matter associated with the speech.

date.name: date
date.comment: The 'Date' field represents the specific date on which parliamentary sitting had happened or when the speech was delivered.

topic_order.name: topic_order
topic_order.comment: 'Topic Order' denotes the sequence or order in which the topic was debated during the sitting.

title.name: title
title.comment: 'Topic Title' represents the title or name of the parliamentary topic.

section_type.name: section_type
section_type.comment:
'Section Type' (or Topic Type) indicates the type of section associated with the topic. This is the acronym.

'Section Type Name' indicates the full name of the section.

| Acronym | Section Type Name                                                               |
|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| BI      | Bill Introduced                                                                 |
| BP      | Second or Third Reading Bills                                                   |
| OA      | Oral Answers to Questions                                                       |
| OS      | Oral Statement                                                                  |
| WA      | Written Answers to Questions                                                    |
| WS      | Correction by Written Statements                                                |
| WANA    | Written Answer to Question for Oral Answer not Answered by End of Question Time |

section_type_name.name: section_type_name
section_type_name.comment:
'Section Type' (or Topic Type) indicates the type of section associated with the topic. This is the acronym.

'Section Type Name' indicates the full name of the section.

| Acronym | Section Type Name                                                               |
|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| BI      | Bill Introduced                                                                 |
| BP      | Second or Third Reading Bills                                                   |
| OA      | Oral Answers to Questions                                                       |
| OS      | Oral Statement                                                                  |
| WA      | Written Answers to Questions                                                    |
| WS      | Correction by Written Statements                                                |
| WANA    | Written Answer to Question for Oral Answer not Answered by End of Question Time |

topic_group_id.name: topic_group_id
topic_group_id.comment:
Corresponds to the topic group number (ID) which is the result of a topic modelling.
For the list of topics, use the following query:

```sql
select
    topic as topic_group_id,
    topic_summary as topic_group_name,
    top_n_words
from `singapore-parliament-speeches.topic_modelling.topic_names_19_nmf_20240331`
order by topic_group_id
```

topic_group_name.name: topic_group_name
topic_group_name.comment:
Corresponds to the topic group's name, which is derived, using an LLM, from the top n words.
For the list of topics, use the following query:

```sql
select
    topic as topic_group_id,
    topic_summary as topic_group_name,
    top_n_words
from `singapore-parliament-speeches.topic_modelling.topic_names_19_nmf_20240331`
order by topic_group_id
```

is_topic_constitutional.name: is_topic_constitutional
is_topic_constitutional.comment:
'Is Topic Constitutional' is a boolean field indicating whether the topic concerns a constitution amendment.

This applies only if:

* The topic is was bill introduced ("BI") or bill in second or third reading ("BP").
* The topic contains the word "Constitution".

Typical examples of topic names which qualify are:

* Constitution of the Republic of Singapore (Amendment) Bill
* Constitution of the Republic of Singapore (Amendment No 2) Bill
* Constitution of the Republic of Singapore (Amendment No 3) Bill

is_topic_procedural.name: is_topic_procedural
is_topic_procedural.comment:
'Is Topic Procedural' is a boolean field indicating whether the topic concerns a procedural statement, and therefore should be considered excluded from the speech count..

This applies only if:

* The topic is bill introduced ("BI")
* The topic is correction by written statements ("WS")

num_rows.label: # Rows
num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

num_bytes.label: Approximate Size
num_bytes.description: Approximate size of table as reported by BigQuery

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_members
metadata.comment: Provides information about members of the parliament, including details such as member name, party affiliation, gender, earliest sitting, latest sitting, count of sittings present, and count of total sittings.

member_name.name: member_name
member_name.comment: 'Member Name' refers to the full name of the Member of Parliament (MP) whose attendance is being recorded.

member_ethnicity.name: member_ethnicity
member_ethnicity.comment: 'Ethnicity' represents the ethnicity of the member (Chinese, Malay, Indian, or Others).

party.name: party
party.comment:
'Party' indicates the political party or designation of the member.

| Acronym |                 Party                 |
| ------- | ------------------------------------- |
| PAP     | People's Action Party                 |
| WP      | Workers' Party                        |
| PSP     | Progress Singapore Party              |
| SPP     | Singapore People's Party              |
| NCMP    | Non-Constituency Member of Parliament |

gender.name: gender
gender.comment: 'Gender' represents the gender of the member (M for Male, F for Female).

earliest_sitting.name: earliest_sitting
earliest_sitting.comment:
'Earliest Sitting' denotes the date of the member's earliest recorded parliamentary sitting.
The earliest sitting in this dataset is 2012-09-10.

latest_sitting.name: latest_sitting
latest_sitting.comment: 'Latest Sitting' represents the date of the member's latest recorded parliamentary sitting.

count_sittings_present.name: count_sittings_present
count_sittings_present.comment: 'Count of Sittings Present' indicates the total number of sittings the member attended.

count_sittings_total.name: count_sittings_total
count_sittings_total.comment: 'Count of Total Sittings' represents the total number of parliamentary sittings during which the member was eligible to participate.
